title: Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Executable-packet v2 Buildprint for a source-independent AI swarm simulation workbench: upload seed material, generate ontology, build graph context, prepare and run simulations, generate reports, chat with agents, and manage history.
plainDescription: A fresh Mapper OS selected packet remapped from MiroFish source evidence and scoped as the full portable AI swarm simulation workbench. It preserves broad product scope while keeping qualification honest until live provider, runtime, browser, persistence, and security proof passes.
promise: Build a portable AI swarm simulation workbench without depending on the original source repo. Status remains SELECTED_UNQUALIFIED until all proof gates pass.
whatYouGet: Executable-packet v2 router and machine contract
Six capability packets with source evidence and proof contracts
Team stack, UX contract, design quality bar, safety boundaries, and evaluation matrix
Evidence ledger seed and unresolved blocker list
whatYouNeed: LLM provider credentials for live ontology/report/profile proof
Zep-compatible graph-memory credentials for live graph proof
OASIS/CAMEL-compatible runtime or approved simulation worker
Persistence backend decision and browser test environment
risks: Counting deterministic adapters as live provider proof
Static graph/report data presented as real behavior
Secret leakage through logs, reports, screenshots, or ledger entries
checks: YAML/JSON/JSONL parse validation expected before publication
Qualification remains SELECTED_UNQUALIFIED until proof gates pass

trustBadges.label: Source-independent
trustBadges.detail: Implementation agents should not need the original source checkout.

copyPrompt: Use the Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench executable-packet v2. Start with BUILDPRINT.md, START_HERE.md, blueprint.yaml, 02-context/context-map.yaml, PRE_IMPLEMENTATION_QUESTIONS.md, and 02-context/team-stack.yaml, then load only the active capability packet. Build source-independently; do not use the original MiroFish source. Keep status SELECTED_UNQUALIFIED until browser, provider, runtime, persistence, security, clean-room, and no-fake proof pass.
